notes:
## v0.5.3 - Debug Logging Added

### Debug Logging
- Added debug logging to keyboard.rs: buffer updates with content
- Added debug logging to trigger.rs: each snippet check with keyword and result
- Added logging to engine.rs: perform_substitution START with keyword and content_type

### To Enable Debug Logs
Run in terminal before launching app:
```powershell
$env:RUST_LOG = "debug"
```

Or check app logs at: `%LOCALAPPDATA%\BeeftextAI\logs\`
